message:
VDBE: fix IsTrue float evaluation and optimize hash join build side

engine.rs: Fix IsTrue opcode to use val.to_float() != 0.0 instead
of val.to_integer() != 0. Float values like 0.5 truncate to integer
0 but should evaluate as truthy.

vectorized_hash_join.rs: Replace HashMap<u64, Vec<BuildRow>> with
intrusive linked list (dense rows array + head map + next chain).
Eliminates per-bucket Vec allocations and improves cache locality.
find_build_matches() walks the chain and reverses to maintain
insertion order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
